messages.content:
No, the late Raila Amolo Odinga passed away on October 15, 2025. He died at age 80 from cardiac arrest at Devamatha Hospital in Koothattukulam, Kerala, India, where he had been receiving treatment for diabetes, hypertension, and chronic kidney disease. He collapsed during a morning walk at the Sreedhareeyam Ayurvedic Eye Hospital.

President William Ruto declared 7 days of mourning with flags at half-mast. Kenya Airways renamed the repatriation flight 'RAO001.' Thousands stormed JKIA airport upon the body's arrival, temporarily shutting down Kenyan airspace. He was buried on October 19, 2025 at his home in Bondo, Siaya County, next to his father Jaramogi Oginga Odinga.

He was posthumously awarded Chief of the Order of the Golden Heart of Kenya (CGH) on Mashujaa Day 2025.

Raila Amolo Odinga died on October 15, 2025 at the age of 80. He suffered a cardiac arrest at Devamatha Hospital in Kerala, India, after collapsing during a morning walk. He had been receiving treatment for diabetes, hypertension, and chronic kidney disease at the Sreedhareeyam Ayurvedic Eye Hospital.

His death came just months after losing the African Union Commission Chairperson election in February 2025 to Djibouti's Mahamoud Ali Youssouf. Kenya mourned deeply — his funeral was one of the largest the country had ever seen.

Ndio, Raila Amolo Odinga alifariki tarehe 15 Oktoba 2025 akiwa na umri wa miaka 80. Alikufa kwa mshtuko wa moyo (cardiac arrest) katika Hospitali ya Devamatha, Kerala, India. Alikuwa akipata matibabu ya kisukari, shinikizo la damu, na ugonjwa wa figo.

Rais Ruto alitangaza siku 7 za maombolezo. Kenya Airways ilibadilisha jina la ndege iliyobeba mwili wake kuwa 'RAO001.' Maelfu ya watu walijaa uwanja wa ndege wa JKIA. Alizikwa tarehe 19 Oktoba 2025 nyumbani kwake Bondo, Siaya County, karibu na baba yake Jaramogi Oginga Odinga.

Alipewa tuzo ya Chief of the Order of the Golden Heart of Kenya baada ya kifo chake.

Raila Odinga passed away on October 15, 2025 in India. He was 80 years old. He suffered a cardiac arrest at Devamatha Hospital in Koothattukulam, Kerala, after collapsing during a routine morning walk at the Sreedhareeyam Ayurvedic Eye Hospital where he was being treated for diabetes, hypertension, and chronic kidney disease.

His death shook Kenya to its core. Indian PM Narendra Modi described him as 'a towering statesman and a cherished friend of India.' The BBC called him 'Father of our democracy.' President Ruto declared a 7-day mourning period.

The scenes at his funeral were extraordinary — his flight was renamed RAO001 and became the most tracked flight in the world. Thousands stormed JKIA airport. At the public viewing at Moi International Sports Centre, police opened fire on surging crowds — at least four people were killed and over 160 injured. He was buried at his Bondo home on October 19, 2025.

Raila Odinga's funeral in October 2025 was one of the most dramatic and emotional events in Kenyan history:

**The repatriation:** Kenya Airways renamed flight KQ203 to 'RAO001' in his honor as it carried his body from India. It became the most tracked flight in the world.

**JKIA chaos:** On October 16, thousands of mourners gathered at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport. They broke through barriers as the coffin was unloaded, forcing Kenya Airports Authority to suspend flights and close Kenyan airspace for two hours.

**Public viewing:** The body was initially to be viewed at Parliament Buildings, but the massive crowds forced a move to the larger Moi International Sports Centre. Police opened fire on surging crowds — at least four people were killed. Doctors Without Borders reported over 160 injured in stampedes.

**State funeral:** October 17 was declared a public holiday. World leaders sent condolences — South Africa's Cyril Ramaphosa, Tanzania's Samia Suluhu, and many others.

**Burial:** Raila was buried on October 19, 2025 at his home in Bondo, Siaya County, next to his father Jaramogi Oginga Odinga.

**Honors:** President Ruto posthumously awarded him Chief of the Order of the Golden Heart of Kenya (CGH) on Mashujaa Day 2025.

Even in death, Raila shut down Kenya — proving that he was not just a politician, he was a movement.

Raila Odinga died of cardiac arrest on October 15, 2025 at Devamatha Hospital in Koothattukulam, Kerala, India. He was 80 years old.

He had been staying at the Sreedhareeyam Ayurvedic Eye Hospital and Research Centre for treatment of diabetes, hypertension, and chronic kidney disease. He collapsed while taking a routine morning walk on the hospital grounds.

His death came months after he lost the African Union Commission Chairperson election in February 2025 in Addis Ababa, defeated by Djibouti's Mahamoud Ali Youssouf after seven rounds of voting. That had been his last major political pursuit after five unsuccessful presidential bids (1997, 2007, 2013, 2017, 2022).

No, 'Baba' — Raila Amolo Odinga — passed away on October 15, 2025 at age 80. He died from cardiac arrest in Kerala, India, where he was receiving medical treatment. He was buried at his home in Bondo, Siaya County on October 19, 2025.

His death left a massive political vacuum in Kenya, particularly in Luo Nyanza where he was the undisputed political leader for decades. No clear successor has emerged. The BBC called him 'Father of our democracy,' and President Ruto awarded him the highest state honor posthumously.

Raila Amolo Odinga alifariki dunia tarehe 15 Oktoba 2025. Alikufa kwa mshtuko wa moyo nchini India akiwa na umri wa miaka 80. Alizikwa nyumbani kwake Bondo, Siaya County, tarehe 19 Oktoba 2025, karibu na kaburi la baba yake Jaramogi Oginga Odinga.

Tunapomkumbuka Baba kama mpiganaji mkuu wa demokrasia ya Kenya. Pumzika kwa amani, Agwambo.
